spans.name: atomic_db_replace
notes: remove old DB family and rename temp DB into place

spans.name: atomic_final_db_validate
notes: open, full integrity gate, and checkpoint after visible replacement

spans.name: atomic_temp_db_finalize
notes: checkpoint and integrity gate on hidden temp DB before visible replacement

spans.name: quick_check
notes: atomic cold temp DB quick gate before replacement
atomic cold final DB quick gate after replacement

spans.name: symbol_interning
notes: Symbol interning is measured through shared dictionary lookup/insert calls.

spans.name: wal_checkpoint
notes: atomic cold temp DB checkpoint before final integrity gate
atomic cold final DB checkpoint after replacement
